└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                         │
                                         │ Push/Pull Images
                                         │ (Authenticated via IAM)
                                         ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                          🔄 CI/CD PIPELINE FLOW                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  1️⃣  DEVELOPER                                                              │
│     └─→ git push → GitHub/GitLab                                            │
│                         │                                                    │
│                         ▼                                                    │
│  2️⃣  AWS CODEPIPELINE                                                       │
│     ├─→ Source: GitHub webhook triggers pipeline                            │
│     │                                                                        │
│     ▼                                                                        │
│  3️⃣  AWS CODEBUILD                                                          │
│     ├─→ Build Django app                                                    │
│     ├─→ Run tests (pytest)                                                  │
│     ├─→ docker build -t anihpj-web:v1.2.0 .                                │
│     ├─→ docker tag anihpj-web:v1.2.0 \                                     │
│     │       123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.2.0│
│     │                                                                        │
│     ▼                                                                        │
│  4️⃣  PUSH TO ECR                                                            │
│     ├─→ aws ecr get-login-password | docker login                          │
│     └─→ docker push 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/...      │
│                         │                                                    │
│                         ▼                                                    │
│  5️⃣  ECR ACTIONS                                                            │
│     ├─→ Store image in S3                                                   │
│     ├─→ Encrypt with KMS                                                    │
│     ├─→ Run vulnerability scan                                              │
│     ├─→ Generate scan report                                                │
│     └─→ Replicate to other regions (if configured)                          │
│                         │                                                    │
│                         ▼                                                    │
│  6️⃣  DEPLOYMENT                                                             │
│     ├─→ ECS Task Definition updated                                         │
│     ├─→ ECS Service rolling update                                          │
│     └─→ Pull new image from ECR                                             │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                         │
                                         │ Deploy Images
                                         ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        🚀 DEPLOYMENT TARGETS                                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  🐳 Amazon ECS (Fargate)                                                    │
│  ├─ anihpj-web service (3 tasks)                                            │
│  │  └─ Pulls: 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.2│
│  │                                                                           │
│  ├─ anihpj-worker service (2 tasks)                                         │
│  │  └─ Pulls: 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-worker:v1│
│  │                                                                           │
│  └─ anihpj-nginx service (2 tasks)                                          │
│     └─ Pulls: 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-nginx:v1 │
│                                                                              │
│  ⚓ Amazon EKS (Kubernetes)                                                 │
│  └─ Deployments pull from ECR via imagePullSecrets                          │
│                                                                              │
│  λ  AWS Lambda (Container Images)                                           │
│  └─ Lambda functions using container images from ECR                        │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      🔐 SECURITY & ACCESS CONTROL                            │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                              │
│  IAM Policies:                                                               │
│  ├─ Developers: ecr:PutImage, ecr:InitiateLayerUpload                      │
│  ├─ CI/CD: ecr:GetAuthorizationToken, ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability      │
│  ├─ ECS Tasks: ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer, ecr:BatchGetImage               │
│  └─ Read-Only: ecr:DescribeImages, ecr:ListImages                          │
│                                                                              │
│  Repository Policies:                                                        │
│  └─ Cross-account access for partner/client deployments                     │
│                                                                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

🔧 Core Concepts

Understanding ECR's core concepts is essential for effective container image management in your anihpj deployment.

📁 Repositories

An ECR repository is a collection of related Docker images. Each repository contains different versions (tags) of the same image.

📦 Repository Structure for anihpj
# Repository naming convention
123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web
123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-worker
123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-nginx
123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-api

# Create repositories
aws ecr create-repository --repository-name anihpj-web --region us-east-1
aws ecr create-repository --repository-name anihpj-worker --region us-east-1
aws ecr create-repository --repository-name anihpj-nginx --region us-east-1

# List repositories
aws ecr describe-repositories --region us-east-1

# Delete repository (careful!)
aws ecr delete-repository --repository-name anihpj-old --force --region us-east-1

Best Practices:

  • One repository per application/service
  • Use descriptive names (anihpj-web, anihpj-worker)
  • Enable tag immutability for production repos
  • Configure lifecycle policies to manage costs
🖼️ Images & Tags

Container images are stored with tags to identify different versions. Proper tagging strategy is crucial for deployment management.

🏷️ Tagging Strategies
# ✅ Semantic Versioning (Recommended)
anihpj-web:v1.0.0          # Major.Minor.Patch
anihpj-web:v1.0.1          # Bug fix
anihpj-web:v1.1.0          # New feature
anihpj-web:v2.0.0          # Breaking change

# ✅ Git Commit SHA (For traceability)
anihpj-web:a1b2c3d         # Short commit hash
anihpj-web:a1b2c3d4e5f6... # Full commit hash

# ✅ Environment Tags
anihpj-web:dev
anihpj-web:staging
anihpj-web:production

# ✅ Date-based Tags
anihpj-web:2026-01-14
anihpj-web:2026.01.14

# ⚠️ Avoid using only 'latest'
anihpj-web:latest          # Hard to track what version is deployed

# 🎯 Recommended: Combine strategies
anihpj-web:v1.2.0-a1b2c3d-prod

# Tag an image with multiple tags
docker tag anihpj-web:v1.2.0 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.2.0
docker tag anihpj-web:v1.2.0 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:latest
docker tag anihpj-web:v1.2.0 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:production

# Push all tags
docker push 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.2.0
docker push 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:latest
docker push 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:production
💡 Image Tag Immutability

Enable tag immutability to prevent tags from being overwritten:

aws ecr put-image-tag-mutability \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --image-tag-mutability IMMUTABLE \
  --region us-east-1

Benefits: Ensures v1.2.0 always points to the same image, preventing accidental overwrites.

♻️ Lifecycle Policies

Automatically clean up old images to reduce storage costs while keeping important images.

🗑️ Lifecycle Policy Examples
# Policy 1: Keep only last 10 images
{
  "rules": [
    {
      "rulePriority": 1,
      "description": "Keep only 10 most recent images",
      "selection": {
        "tagStatus": "any",
        "countType": "imageCountMoreThan",
        "countNumber": 10
      },
      "action": {
        "type": "expire"
      }
    }
  ]
}

# Policy 2: Delete untagged images older than 7 days
{
  "rules": [
    {
      "rulePriority": 1,
      "description": "Delete untagged images after 7 days",
      "selection": {
        "tagStatus": "untagged",
        "countType": "sinceImagePushed",
        "countUnit": "days",
        "countNumber": 7
      },
      "action": {
        "type": "expire"
      }
    }
  ]
}

# Policy 3: Keep production tags indefinitely, expire dev tags after 30 days
{
  "rules": [
    {
      "rulePriority": 1,
      "description": "Expire dev images after 30 days",
      "selection": {
        "tagStatus": "tagged",
        "tagPrefixList": ["dev", "feature"],
        "countType": "sinceImagePushed",
        "countUnit": "days",
        "countNumber": 30
      },
      "action": {
        "type": "expire"
      }
    },
    {
      "rulePriority": 2,
      "description": "Keep production images",
      "selection": {
        "tagStatus": "tagged",
        "tagPrefixList": ["prod", "v"],
        "countType": "imageCountMoreThan",
        "countNumber": 100
      },
      "action": {
        "type": "expire"
      }
    }
  ]
}

# Apply lifecycle policy
aws ecr put-lifecycle-policy \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --lifecycle-policy-text file://lifecycle-policy.json \
  --region us-east-1

# Preview what would be deleted (dry run)
aws ecr get-lifecycle-policy-preview \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --region us-east-1

Recommended Policy for anihpj:

  • Keep last 20 production images (v*)
  • Delete dev/staging images after 30 days
  • Delete untagged images after 7 days
  • Keep images with "keep" tag indefinitely
🔄 How Lifecycle Policies Work (Visual Flowchart)
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│              ♻️ ECR LIFECYCLE POLICY EVALUATION & EXECUTION                              │
│                  (Automated Image Cleanup for anihpj)                                    │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

TRIGGER: Lifecycle policies evaluate automatically every 24 hours
┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  ⏰ EVALUATION SCHEDULE                                                       │
│  ├─ Frequency: Daily (24-hour cycle)                                          │
│  ├─ Time: Random within 24-hour window                                        │
│  └─ Trigger: Can also be manually triggered via dry-run preview               │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                        │
                                        ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 1: FETCH ALL IMAGES IN REPOSITORY                                                 │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  📦 Repository: anihpj-web                                                               │
│  🔍 Query: List all images (tagged + untagged)                                           │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  TAGGED IMAGES (23 total):                                      │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.0     [pushed: 60 days ago]   🏷️           │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.1     [pushed: 58 days ago]   🏷️           │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.2     [pushed: 55 days ago]   🏷️           │                    │
│  │  ├─ ... (15 more versions)                                      │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.2.0     [pushed: 1 day ago]     🏷️           │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.2.1     [pushed: today]         🏷️           │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:dev-abc    [pushed: 45 days ago]   🏷️ (dev)     │                    │
│  │  └─ anihpj-web:latest     [alias → v1.2.1]        🏷️           │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  UNTAGGED IMAGES (12 total):                                    │                    │
│  │  ├─ sha256:a1b2c3...      [pushed: 15 days ago]   ❌ untagged   │                    │
│  │  ├─ sha256:d4e5f6...      [pushed: 10 days ago]   ❌ untagged   │                    │
│  │  ├─ sha256:g7h8i9...      [pushed: 8 days ago]    ❌ untagged   │                    │
│  │  ├─ ... (9 more untagged images)                                │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  Total: 35 images (23 tagged + 12 untagged)                                             │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                        │
                                        ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 2: EVALUATE POLICY RULES (Priority Order)                                         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  📜 Policy Rules (evaluated in priority order):                                          │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │  RULE 1 (Priority: 1)                                                           │    │
│  │  Description: "Delete untagged images older than 7 days"                        │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Filter Criteria:                                                                │    │
│  │  ├─ Tag Status: UNTAGGED                                                        │    │
│  │  ├─ Age: > 7 days                                                               │    │
│  │  └─ Count Type: sinceImagePushed                                                │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Images Matched:                                                                 │    │
│  │  ├─ sha256:a1b2c3... (15 days old) ← WILL DELETE ❌                            │    │
│  │  ├─ sha256:d4e5f6... (10 days old) ← WILL DELETE ❌                            │    │
│  │  ├─ sha256:g7h8i9... (8 days old)  ← WILL DELETE ❌                            │    │
│  │  └─ 5 more untagged images > 7 days                                             │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Kept:                                                                           │    │
│  │  └─ 4 untagged images < 7 days (too recent to delete)                          │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Action: 🗑️ EXPIRE (delete)                                                     │    │
│  │  Result: 8 untagged images marked for deletion                                  │    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐    │
│  │  RULE 2 (Priority: 2)                                                           │    │
│  │  Description: "Keep only last 10 tagged images"                                 │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Filter Criteria:                                                                │    │
│  │  ├─ Tag Status: TAGGED (any tag)                                                │    │
│  │  ├─ Count Type: imageCountMoreThan                                              │    │
│  │  └─ Count Number: 10                                                            │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Sort: By push date (newest first)                                              │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Images Found: 23 tagged images                                                 │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Keep (10 newest):                                                               │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.2.1   (pushed: today)        ✅ KEEP                         │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.2.0   (pushed: 1 day ago)    ✅ KEEP                         │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.1.9   (pushed: 5 days ago)   ✅ KEEP                         │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.1.8   (pushed: 8 days ago)   ✅ KEEP                         │    │
│  │  ├─ ... (6 more recent images kept)                                             │    │
│  │  └─ anihpj-web:v1.1.0   (pushed: 25 days ago)  ✅ KEEP (10th image)            │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Expire (13 oldest):                                                             │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.0   (pushed: 60 days ago)  ← WILL DELETE ❌                │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.1   (pushed: 58 days ago)  ← WILL DELETE ❌                │    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.2   (pushed: 55 days ago)  ← WILL DELETE ❌                │    │
│  │  ├─ ... (10 more old versions)                                                  │    │
│  │  └─ anihpj-web:dev-abc  (pushed: 45 days ago)  ← WILL DELETE ❌                │    │
│  │                                                                                  │    │
│  │  Action: 🗑️ EXPIRE (delete 13 images exceeding limit)                          │    │
│  │  Result: 13 old tagged images marked for deletion                               │    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘    │
│                                                                                          │
│  ⚠️  Note: Once an image is marked for deletion by a rule, later rules skip it          │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                        │
                                        ▼

│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │

│  │  ├─ sha256:d4e5f6... (10 days old, 498 MB)                     │                    │

│  │  └─ 5 more untagged images                                      │                    │
│  │     Total: 8 images, ~4 GB                                      │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │

│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.0 (60 days old, 512 MB)                    │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.1 (58 days old, 513 MB)                    │                    │
│  │  ├─ anihpj-web:v1.0.2 (55 days old, 515 MB)                    │                    │
│  │  └─ 10 more old tagged versions                                 │                    │
│  │     Total: 13 images, ~6.5 GB                                   │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  TOTAL TO DELETE:                                                │                    │
│  │  ├─ 21 images                                                    │                    │
│  │  ├─ ~10.5 GB storage                                             │                    │
│  │  └─ Estimated savings: $1.05/month                              │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  Remaining Images After Cleanup:                                │                    │
│  │  ├─ 10 tagged images (v1.1.0 → v1.2.1)                          │                    │
│  │  ├─ 4 untagged images (< 7 days old)                            │                    │
│  │  └─ Total: 14 images, ~7 GB                                     │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                        │
                                        ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 4: EXECUTE DELETIONS                                                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  🗑️  Deletion Process:                                                                   │
│                                                                                          │
│  For each image in deletion list:                                                       │
│  1️⃣  Check if image is being used (pulled in last 24 hours)                             │
│     ├─ If YES: Skip (safety check)                                                      │
│     └─ If NO: Proceed with deletion                                                     │
│                                                                                          │
│  2️⃣  Delete image manifest from registry                                                │
│     └─ Status: ✅ Manifest deleted                                                       │
│                                                                                          │
│  3️⃣  Delete unreferenced layers from S3                                                 │
│     ├─ Layer deduplication: Layers shared by other images are preserved                │
│     └─ Status: ✅ Unique layers deleted                                                  │
│                                                                                          │
│  4️⃣  Update repository metadata                                                          │
│     └─ Status: ✅ Image count updated                                                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  📊 Deletion Results:                                                                    │
│  ├─ ✅ Successfully deleted: 21 images (10.5 GB)                                        │
│  ├─ ⏭️  Skipped: 0 images (none in use)                                                 │
│  ├─ ❌ Failed: 0 images                                                                  │
│  └─ ⏱️  Duration: 3m 42s                                                                 │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                        │
                                        ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 5: LOG & NOTIFY                                                                   │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  📝 CloudWatch Logs:                                                                     │
│  ├─ Lifecycle policy execution logged                                                   │
│  ├─ Each deleted image recorded with timestamp                                          │
│  └─ Storage savings calculated                                                          │
│                                                                                          │
│  🔔 Notifications (if configured):                                                       │
│  ├─ SNS Topic: arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:ecr-lifecycle                        │
│  ├─ Email: devops@anihpj.com                                                            │
│  └─ Message:                                                                             │
│      "✅ ECR Lifecycle Policy executed on anihpj-web"                                   │
│      "Deleted: 21 images (10.5 GB)"                                                     │
│      "Savings: $1.05/month"                                                             │
│      "Remaining: 14 images (7 GB)"                                                      │
│                                                                                          │
│  📊 CloudWatch Metrics:                                                                  │
│  ├─ RepositoryStorage: Decreased from 17.5 GB → 7 GB                                   │
│  ├─ ImageCount: Decreased from 35 → 14                                                 │
│  └─ LastLifecycleExecution: 2026-01-14 06:32:15 UTC                                    │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                          💡 LIFECYCLE POLICY BEST PRACTICES                              │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  ✅ Use DRY RUN first to preview what will be deleted                                   │
│     $ aws ecr start-lifecycle-policy-preview --repository-name anihpj-web              │
│                                                                                          │
│  ✅ Start conservative: Keep last 20 images initially, adjust based on needs            │
│                                                                                          │
│  ✅ Use tag prefixes to protect important images (prod-*, v*, release-*)               │
│                                                                                          │
│  ✅ Delete untagged images aggressively (they're usually build artifacts)               │
│                                                                                          │
│  ✅ Set up CloudWatch alerts for unexpected storage spikes                              │
│                                                                                          │
│  ✅ Review policy effectiveness monthly and adjust rules                                 │
│                                                                                          │
│  ⚠️  Never delete images pushed < 7 days ago (allows rollback window)                   │
│                                                                                          │
│  ⚠️  Test policies in dev environment before applying to production                     │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

🚀 Getting Started Guide

Step-by-step guide to push your anihpj Django application to Amazon ECR.

⚙️ Initial Setup
1️⃣ Install AWS CLI and Docker
# Install AWS CLI
curl "https://awscli.amazonaws.com/awscli-exe-linux-x86_64.zip" -o "awscliv2.zip"
unzip awscliv2.zip
sudo ./aws/install

# Verify installation
aws --version

# Configure AWS credentials
aws configure
# AWS Access Key ID: YOUR_ACCESS_KEY
# AWS Secret Access Key: YOUR_SECRET_KEY
# Default region: us-east-1
# Default output format: json

# Install Docker
curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com -o get-docker.sh
sudo sh get-docker.sh
sudo usermod -aG docker $USER

# Verify Docker
docker --version
2️⃣ Create ECR Repository
# Create repository for anihpj web application
aws ecr create-repository \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --image-scanning-configuration scanOnPush=true \
  --encryption-configuration encryptionType=AES256 \
  --region us-east-1

# Output:
{
  "repository": {
    "repositoryArn": "arn:aws:ecr:us-east-1:123456789012:repository/anihpj-web",
    "registryId": "123456789012",
    "repositoryName": "anihpj-web",
    "repositoryUri": "123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web",
    "createdAt": "2026-01-14T10:30:00.000000+00:00",
    "imageTagMutability": "MUTABLE",
    "imageScanningConfiguration": {
      "scanOnPush": true
    },
    "encryptionConfiguration": {
      "encryptionType": "AES256"
    }
  }
}

# Note the repositoryUri - you'll use this to push images
📤 Push Your First Image
3️⃣ Build and Tag Docker Image
# Navigate to your anihpj project
cd /path/to/anihpj

# Create Dockerfile if you haven't
cat > Dockerfile << 'EOF'
FROM python:3.12-slim

# Set environment variables
ENV PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1
ENV PYTHONUNBUFFERED=1
ENV DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=anihpj.settings

# Set work directory
WORKDIR /app

# Install system dependencies
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    postgresql-client \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

# Install Python dependencies
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt

# Copy project
COPY . .

# Collect static files
RUN python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

# Run gunicorn
CMD ["gunicorn", "--bind", "0.0.0.0:8000", "--workers", "4", "anihpj.wsgi:application"]
EOF

# Build Docker image
docker build -t anihpj-web:v1.0.0 .

# Verify image was built
docker images | grep anihpj-web
4️⃣ Authenticate Docker to ECR
# Get authentication token and login to ECR
aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | \
  docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \
  123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com

# Output: Login Succeeded

# Alternative (older method, still works)
$(aws ecr get-login --no-include-email --region us-east-1)
5️⃣ Tag and Push Image to ECR
# Tag your image with ECR repository URI
docker tag anihpj-web:v1.0.0 \
  123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.0.0

# Also tag as 'latest'
docker tag anihpj-web:v1.0.0 \
  123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:latest

# Push to ECR
docker push 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.0.0
docker push 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:latest

# Output shows upload progress:
# The push refers to repository [123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web]
# a1b2c3d4: Pushed
# e5f6g7h8: Pushed
# ...
# v1.0.0: digest: sha256:abc123... size: 2827

# Verify image was pushed
aws ecr describe-images \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --region us-east-1
📥 Pull Images
🔽 Pull Image from ECR
# Authenticate (if not already)
aws ecr get-login-password --region us-east-1 | \
  docker login --username AWS --password-stdin \
  123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com

# Pull specific version
docker pull 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.0.0

# Pull latest
docker pull 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:latest

# Run the pulled image
docker run -d -p 8000:8000 \
  --name anihpj-web \
  --env-file .env \
  123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.0.0

# Verify container is running
docker ps | grep anihpj-web

💰 Pricing & Cost Optimization

💸 Pricing Models

Amazon ECR has simple, pay-as-you-go pricing with no upfront costs or minimum fees.

💵 ECR Pricing Components
Component Private Registry Public Registry
Storage $0.10 per GB/month $0.10 per GB/month (50 GB free)
Data Transfer IN Free Free
Data Transfer OUT (Internet) $0.09 per GB 500 GB free/month, then $0.09/GB
Data Transfer OUT (same region) Free (to ECS/EKS/Lambda) Free
Free Tier 500 MB storage (12 months) 50 GB storage always free
🧮 Cost Scenarios for anihpj
📊 Monthly Cost Examples
Scenario Storage Data Transfer Monthly Cost
🧪 Development 3 images × 500 MB each
= 1.5 GB total 		5 GB/month (same region)
Free to ECS/EKS 		$0.15/month
($0.10 × 1.5 GB)
🏢 Small Production 5 repos × 10 images × 500 MB
= 25 GB total 		50 GB/month (same region)
Free to ECS/EKS 		$2.50/month
($0.10 × 25 GB)
🚀 Medium Production 10 repos × 20 images × 500 MB
= 100 GB total 		200 GB/month (same region)
Free to ECS/EKS 		$10.00/month
($0.10 × 100 GB)
🌐 Multi-Region Production 100 GB in us-east-1
100 GB in eu-west-1
= 200 GB total 		50 GB cross-region replication
($0.09 × 50 GB = $4.50) 		$24.50/month
$20 (storage) + $4.50 (transfer)
💡 anihpj Estimate: For a typical anihpj deployment with 5 repositories (web, worker, nginx, api, batch) storing 10 versions each at ~500MB, you'd pay approximately $2.50/month for ECR storage.
⚡ Cost Optimization Strategies
💰 Top 10 Ways to Reduce ECR Costs
1. Implement Lifecycle Policies

Automatically delete old images to reduce storage costs by 60-80%.

# Keep only last 15 images
{
  "rules": [{
    "rulePriority": 1,
    "selection": {
      "tagStatus": "any",
      "countType": "imageCountMoreThan",
      "countNumber": 15
    },
    "action": {"type": "expire"}
  }]
}
2. Delete Untagged Images Regularly

Failed builds and intermediate layers create untagged images that consume storage.

# Delete untagged images older than 1 day
aws ecr list-images --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --filter "tagStatus=UNTAGGED" --query 'imageIds[*]' \
  --output json | jq -r '.[] | "--image-ids imageDigest=\(.imageDigest)"' | \
  xargs -I {} aws ecr batch-delete-image --repository-name anihpj-web {}
3. Use Multi-Stage Docker Builds

Reduce image size by 50-70% using multi-stage builds to exclude build dependencies.

# Multi-stage Dockerfile
FROM python:3.12 AS builder
WORKDIR /app
COPY requirements.txt .
RUN pip install --user -r requirements.txt

FROM python:3.12-slim
WORKDIR /app
COPY --from=builder /root/.local /root/.local
COPY . .
# Final image is much smaller!
4. Compress Image Layers

Combine RUN commands and clean up in the same layer to reduce image size.

# ❌ Bad: Creates multiple layers
RUN apt-get update
RUN apt-get install -y package1
RUN apt-get install -y package2
RUN apt-get clean

# ✅ Good: Single layer
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y package1 package2 && \
    apt-get clean && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*
5. Use Same-Region Deployments

Data transfer to ECS/EKS/Lambda in the same region is FREE. Avoid cross-region pulls.

  • ECR in us-east-1 → ECS in us-east-1 = FREE
  • ECR in us-east-1 → ECS in eu-west-1 = $0.09/GB
6. Enable Image Layer Caching

Reuse unchanged layers across images to reduce storage duplication.

# Order Dockerfile commands from least to most frequently changing
FROM python:3.12-slim
COPY requirements.txt .          # Changes rarely
RUN pip install -r requirements.txt
COPY . .                          # Changes often
# Layers are shared across builds!
7. Use Smaller Base Images

Choose alpine or slim variants to reduce image size by 60-80%.

  • python:3.12 → 1.1 GB
  • python:3.12-slim → 150 MB
  • python:3.12-alpine → 50 MB
8. Monitor and Alert on Storage Growth

Set up CloudWatch alarms for unexpected storage increases.

aws cloudwatch put-metric-alarm \
  --alarm-name ecr-storage-high \
  --alarm-description "Alert when ECR storage > 100GB" \
  --metric-name RepositoryStorage \
  --namespace AWS/ECR \
  --statistic Average \
  --period 86400 \
  --threshold 107374182400 \
  --comparison-operator GreaterThanThreshold
9. Use Public ECR for Open Source Projects

Public ECR offers 50 GB free storage always and 500 GB/month free bandwidth.

  • Private ECR: $0.10/GB storage
  • Public ECR: First 50 GB free
  • Perfect for open-source anihpj community edition
10. Compress Application Files

Use .dockerignore to exclude unnecessary files from images.

# .dockerignore
__pycache__
*.pyc
*.pyo
*.pyd
.git
.gitignore
.env
.venv
node_modules/
*.md
.pytest_cache/
htmlcov/
.coverage
💡 Expected Savings for anihpj

Without optimization: 50 GB storage × $0.10 = $5.00/month

With optimization: 10 GB storage × $0.10 = $1.00/month

💰 Savings: $4.00/month (80% reduction) = $48/year

🔒 Security & Best Practices

🛡️ ECR Security Architecture for anihpj
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        🔒 AMAZON ECR SECURITY LAYERS                                     │
│                    (Defense in Depth for anihpj Containers)                              │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

LAYER 1: NETWORK SECURITY
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                                          │
│  🌐 PUBLIC INTERNET                                                                      │
│  └─ ❌ Direct access blocked                                                             │
│                                                                                          │
│  🔗 VPC ENDPOINT (PrivateLink)                                                           │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐        │
│  │  Interface Endpoint: vpce-12345678                                          │        │
│  │  Subnet: subnet-private-1a, subnet-private-1b                               │        │
│  │  Security Group: sg-ecr-endpoint                                            │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  Inbound Rules:                                                              │        │
│  │  ├─ HTTPS (443) from VPC CIDR (10.0.0.0/16)                                │        │
│  │  └─ Docker API from ECS security group                                      │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  Benefits:                                                                   │        │
│  │  ✅ Private connection (no internet required)                               │        │
│  │  ✅ Reduced data transfer costs                                             │        │
│  │  ✅ Enhanced security posture                                                │        │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘        │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

LAYER 2: IDENTITY & ACCESS MANAGEMENT (IAM)
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                                          │
│  👤 IAM ROLES & POLICIES                                                                 │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                   │
│  │  🔑 Developer Role: anihpj-developer                             │                   │
│  │  Permissions:                                                     │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:PutImage                  (Push images)                  │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:InitiateLayerUpload       (Upload layers)                │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:CompleteLayerUpload       (Finish upload)                │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability                              │                   │
│  │  └─ ecr:GetAuthorizationToken     (Login to ECR)                 │                   │
│  │                                                                   │                   │
│  │  MFA Required: ✅ YES (for production pushes)                    │                   │
│  │  IP Restriction: ✅ Office IPs only                              │                   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                   │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                   │
│  │  🤖 CI/CD Role: anihpj-codebuild-role                            │                   │
│  │  Permissions:                                                     │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:GetAuthorizationToken                                    │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability                              │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:PutImage                                                 │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:InitiateLayerUpload                                      │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:CompleteLayerUpload                                      │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:UploadLayerPart                                          │                   │
│  │  └─ ecr:BatchGetImage              (For layer caching)           │                   │
│  │                                                                   │                   │
│  │  Attached to: AWS CodeBuild project                              │                   │
│  │  Condition: Only from CodeBuild service                          │                   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                   │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                   │
│  │  📦 ECS Task Execution Role: anihpj-ecs-task-role                │                   │
│  │  Permissions:                                                     │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:GetAuthorizationToken     (Login)                        │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:BatchGetImage              (Pull images)                 │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer     (Download layers)             │                   │
│  │  └─ ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability                              │                   │
│  │                                                                   │                   │
│  │  Read-Only: ✅ YES (cannot push/delete)                          │                   │
│  │  Repository: anihpj-* (wildcard for all anihpj repos)            │                   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                   │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                   │
│  │  👁️  Security Audit Role: anihpj-security-auditor                │                   │
│  │  Permissions:                                                     │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:DescribeImages             (List images)                 │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:DescribeImageScanFindings  (View scans)                  │                   │
│  │  ├─ ecr:GetLifecyclePolicy         (View policies)               │                   │
│  │  └─ ecr:ListImages                 (Inventory)                   │                   │
│  │                                                                   │                   │
│  │  Read-Only: ✅ YES                                                │                   │
│  │  Used by: Security team for compliance audits                    │                   │
│  └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                   │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

LAYER 3: ENCRYPTION
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                                          │
│  🔐 ENCRYPTION AT REST (S3 Storage)                                                      │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  Default Encryption: AES-256 (SSE-S3)                                       │        │
│  │  ├─ Enabled: ✅ Automatic                                                   │        │
│  │  ├─ Cost: ✅ Free                                                            │        │
│  │  └─ Managed by: AWS                                                          │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  Enhanced Encryption: AWS KMS (Customer-Managed Keys)                        │        │
│  │  ├─ Key: anihpj-ecr-kms-key                                                 │        │
│  │  ├─ Key Policy: Granular access control                                     │        │
│  │  ├─ Rotation: ✅ Automatic (yearly)                                         │        │
│  │  ├─ Audit: CloudTrail logs all key usage                                    │        │
│  │  └─ Cost: $1/month + $0.03 per 10,000 requests                             │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  🎯 Recommendation for anihpj:                                               │        │
│  │     Development: AES-256 (default)                                           │        │
│  │     Production: AWS KMS (enhanced compliance)                                │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘        │
│                                                                                          │
│  🔐 ENCRYPTION IN TRANSIT (HTTPS/TLS)                                                    │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  All ECR API calls use HTTPS (TLS 1.2+)                                     │        │
│  │  ├─ Docker push: Encrypted                                                  │        │
│  │  ├─ Docker pull: Encrypted                                                  │        │
│  │  ├─ API calls: Encrypted                                                    │        │
│  │  └─ Management console: Encrypted                                            │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  │  Certificate: AWS managed                                                    │        │
│  │  Cipher Suites: Strong encryption only                                       │        │
│  │                                                                              │        │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘        │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

LAYER 4: IMAGE SCANNING & VULNERABILITY DETECTION
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                                          │
│  🔍 AUTOMATED VULNERABILITY SCANNING                                                     │
│                                                                                          │
│  Scan on Push: ✅ ENABLED                                                                │
│  Scan Type: Enhanced Scanning (Amazon Inspector + Snyk)                                 │
│  Scan Frequency: Continuous (re-scan every 24 hours)                                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  📦 Image: anihpj-web:v1.0.42                                   │                    │
│  │  Pushed: 2026-01-14 15:30:22 UTC                                │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Scan Status: ✅ COMPLETE                                       │                    │
│  │  Scan Time: 2m 15s                                              │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  🎯 Findings Summary:                                            │                    │
│  │  ├─ 🔴 CRITICAL:  0                                             │                    │
│  │  ├─ 🟠 HIGH:      0                                             │                    │
│  │  ├─ 🟡 MEDIUM:    2   ← Action recommended                      │                    │
│  │  ├─ 🟢 LOW:       5                                             │                    │
│  │  └─ ℹ️  INFO:      8                                             │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  📝 Medium Severity Issues:                                      │                    │
│  │  1. CVE-2024-5678: OpenSSL outdated (1.1.1k → upgrade to 3.0.x)│                    │
│  │  2. CVE-2024-9012: pip 21.3 has known vulnerability             │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  ✅ Deployment Decision: APPROVED (no critical issues)          │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  🚨 SCAN POLICIES & ALERTS                                                               │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  Policy: Block on Critical/High                                 │                    │
│  │  ├─ Critical findings: ❌ Fail deployment                       │                    │
│  │  ├─ High findings: ❌ Fail deployment                           │                    │
│  │  ├─ Medium findings: ⚠️  Alert team                             │                    │
│  │  └─ Low findings: ℹ️  Log only                                  │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Notifications:                                                  │                    │
│  │  ├─ SNS Topic: arn:aws:sns:us-east-1:123456789012:ecr-findings │                    │
│  │  ├─ Email: security@anihpj.com                                  │                    │
│  │  ├─ Slack: #security-alerts                                     │                    │
│  │  └─ PagerDuty: Critical/High only                               │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

LAYER 5: IMAGE TAG IMMUTABILITY & LIFECYCLE
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                                          │
│  🔒 IMAGE TAG IMMUTABILITY                                                               │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  Repository: anihpj-web                                          │                    │
│  │  Immutability: ✅ ENABLED                                        │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Effect:                                                         │                    │
│  │  ├─ ❌ Cannot overwrite existing tags                           │                    │
│  │  ├─ ✅ Prevents accidental/malicious overwrites                 │                    │
│  │  ├─ ✅ Ensures reproducible builds                              │                    │
│  │  └─ ✅ Audit trail preserved                                    │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Example:                                                        │                    │
│  │  $ docker push anihpj-web:v1.0.0                                │                    │
│  │  ✅ Success (first time)                                        │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  $ docker push anihpj-web:v1.0.0  (different image)             │                    │
│  │  ❌ Error: Tag immutability prevents overwrite                  │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  ♻️  LIFECYCLE POLICIES                                                                  │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  Policy: Production Image Retention                             │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Rule 1: Keep last 10 tagged images                             │                    │
│  │  ├─ Priority: 1                                                 │                    │
│  │  ├─ Tag Status: TAGGED                                          │                    │
│  │  ├─ Count: Keep 10                                              │                    │
│  │  └─ Action: Delete older versions                               │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Rule 2: Delete untagged images after 7 days                    │                    │
│  │  ├─ Priority: 2                                                 │                    │
│  │  ├─ Tag Status: UNTAGGED                                        │                    │
│  │  ├─ Age: > 7 days                                               │                    │
│  │  └─ Action: Delete                                              │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Savings: ~70% reduction in storage costs!                      │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

LAYER 6: AUDIT LOGGING & COMPLIANCE
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                                                                                          │
│  📝 AWS CLOUDTRAIL LOGGING                                                               │
│  ┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                    │
│  │  All ECR API calls logged to CloudTrail                         │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Events Captured:                                                │                    │
│  │  ├─ PutImage (image pushes)                                     │                    │
│  │  ├─ BatchGetImage (image pulls)                                 │                    │
│  │  ├─ DeleteRepository                                             │                    │
│  │  ├─ PutLifecyclePolicy                                           │                    │
│  │  ├─ SetRepositoryPolicy                                          │                    │
│  │  └─ StartImageScan                                               │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Log Details Include:                                            │                    │
│  │  ├─ Who: IAM user/role                                          │                    │
│  │  ├─ What: API action                                            │                    │
│  │  ├─ When: Timestamp                                             │                    │
│  │  ├─ Where: IP address, region                                   │                    │
│  │  └─ Result: Success/failure                                     │                    │
│  │                                                                  │                    │
│  │  Retention: 90 days (CloudTrail) + S3 archive (indefinite)      │                    │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                    │
│                                                                                          │
│  🛡️  COMPLIANCE CERTIFICATIONS                                                           │
│  ├─ ✅ SOC 1, SOC 2, SOC 3                                                              │
│  ├─ ✅ PCI DSS Level 1                                                                  │
│  ├─ ✅ HIPAA eligible                                                                   │
│  ├─ ✅ ISO 27001, 27017, 27018                                                          │
│  ├─ ✅ FedRAMP Moderate                                                                 │
│  └─ ✅ GDPR compliant                                                                   │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

💡 ANIHPJ SECURITY CHECKLIST:
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ VPC Endpoints configured (private networking)
✅ IAM roles with least privilege (no wildcards)
✅ KMS encryption enabled for production repos
✅ Image tag immutability enabled
✅ Enhanced scanning enabled (continuous)
✅ Lifecycle policies active (auto-cleanup)
✅ CloudTrail logging enabled
✅ SNS alerts configured for critical findings
✅ Repository policies restrict cross-account access
✅ MFA required for production pushes
🔍 Image Scanning

ECR provides automated vulnerability scanning to identify software vulnerabilities in your container images.

🛡️ Scanning Types
Feature Basic Scanning Enhanced Scanning (Inspector)
Cost Free $0.09 per image scan
Database Clair (CVE database) Amazon Inspector (CVE + advisories)
Scan Trigger On push only Continuous monitoring
Coverage OS packages OS packages + language libraries
Best For Development/testing Production workloads
🔧 Enable Scanning for anihpj
# Enable basic scanning on push
aws ecr put-image-scanning-configuration \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --image-scanning-configuration scanOnPush=true

# Enable enhanced scanning (Inspector)
aws ecr put-registry-scanning-configuration \
  --scan-type ENHANCED \
  --rules '[{"repositoryFilters": [{"filter": "anihpj-*", "filterType": "WILDCARD"}], "scanFrequency": "CONTINUOUS_SCAN"}]'

# Retrieve scan findings
aws ecr describe-image-scan-findings \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --image-id imageTag=v1.0.0
⚠️ Recommended for anihpj: Use Enhanced Scanning for production repositories (anihpj-web, anihpj-worker) and Basic Scanning for development repositories. This balances security with cost.
📊 Sample Scan Results
{
  "imageScanFindings": {
    "findings": [
      {
        "name": "CVE-2024-1234",
        "severity": "HIGH",
        "description": "SQL injection vulnerability in Django",
        "uri": "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-1234",
        "attributes": [
          {"key": "package_name", "value": "django"},
          {"key": "package_version", "value": "3.2.10"},
          {"key": "CVSS_v3_score", "value": "7.5"}
        ]
      },
      {
        "name": "CVE-2024-5678",
        "severity": "MEDIUM",
        "description": "Outdated OpenSSL library",
        "uri": "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2024-5678",
        "attributes": [
          {"key": "package_name", "value": "openssl"},
          {"key": "package_version", "value": "1.1.1k"},
          {"key": "CVSS_v3_score", "value": "5.3"}
        ]
      }
    ],
    "findingSeverityCounts": {
      "CRITICAL": 0,
      "HIGH": 1,
      "MEDIUM": 1,
      "LOW": 3,
      "INFORMATIONAL": 5
    }
  }
}
🔑 IAM Policies & Access Control

Secure your ECR repositories with fine-grained IAM policies and repository policies.

🛡️ IAM Policy Examples for anihpj
1️⃣ Read-Only Access (For ECS Tasks) 
{
  "Version": "2012-10-17",
  "Statement": [
    {
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Action": [
        "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer",
        "ecr:BatchGetImage",
        "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability"
      ],
      "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:us-east-1:123456789012:repository/anihpj-*"
    },
    {
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Action": "ecr:GetAuthorizationToken",
      "Resource": "*"
    }
  ]
}
2️⃣ Push Access (For CI/CD Pipeline) 
{
  "Version": "2012-10-17",
  "Statement": [
    {
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Action": [
        "ecr:CompleteLayerUpload",
        "ecr:UploadLayerPart",
        "ecr:InitiateLayerUpload",
        "ecr:BatchCheckLayerAvailability",
        "ecr:PutImage"
      ],
      "Resource": "arn:aws:ecr:us-east-1:123456789012:repository/anihpj-*"
    },
    {
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Action": "ecr:GetAuthorizationToken",
      "Resource": "*"
    }
  ]
}
3️⃣ Repository Policy (Cross-Account Access) 
{
  "Version": "2012-10-17",
  "Statement": [
    {
      "Sid": "AllowPullFromProductionAccount",
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Principal": {
        "AWS": "arn:aws:iam::987654321098:root"
      },
      "Action": [
        "ecr:BatchGetImage",
        "ecr:GetDownloadUrlForLayer"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
4️⃣ Restrict Push to Specific Roles 
{
  "Version": "2012-10-17",
  "Statement": [
    {
      "Sid": "AllowPushOnlyFromCodeBuild",
      "Effect": "Allow",
      "Principal": {
        "Service": "codebuild.amazonaws.com"
      },
      "Action": "ecr:*",
      "Condition": {
        "StringEquals": {
          "aws:SourceArn": "arn:aws:codebuild:us-east-1:123456789012:project/anihpj-build"
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
💡 Best Practice: Use IAM roles for service-to-service access (ECS, Lambda) and repository policies for cross-account access. Never hardcode AWS credentials in your Docker images!
🔐 Encryption & Compliance

ECR provides encryption at rest and in transit to protect your container images.

🔒

Encryption at Rest

All images are encrypted using AES-256 encryption.

  • AWS-managed keys (default, free)
  • Customer-managed KMS keys (more control)
  • Automatic encryption for all repositories
🌐

Encryption in Transit

All data transfers use HTTPS/TLS encryption.

  • Docker push/pull over HTTPS
  • API calls over TLS 1.2+
  • VPC endpoints for private traffic
✅

Compliance

ECR meets major security standards.

  • PCI DSS Level 1
  • HIPAA eligible
  • SOC 1, 2, 3
  • ISO 27001, 27017, 27018
🔧 Enable KMS Encryption for anihpj
# Create KMS key
aws kms create-key --description "ECR encryption for anihpj"

# Enable KMS encryption for repository
aws ecr create-repository \
  --repository-name anihpj-web \
  --encryption-configuration \
    encryptionType=KMS,kmsKey=arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012 \
  --image-scanning-configuration scanOnPush=true

# Create VPC endpoint for private ECR access
aws ec2 create-vpc-endpoint \
  --vpc-id vpc-123456 \
  --service-name com.amazonaws.us-east-1.ecr.dkr \
  --route-table-ids rtb-123456
✅ Security Checklist for anihpj
  • ✅ Enable image scanning on all repositories
  • ✅ Use IAM roles instead of access keys
  • ✅ Enable KMS encryption for sensitive workloads
  • ✅ Implement lifecycle policies to remove old images
  • ✅ Enable image tag immutability for production
  • ✅ Use VPC endpoints for private access
  • ✅ Enable CloudTrail logging for audit trails
  • ✅ Regularly review scan findings and patch vulnerabilities
  • ✅ Use repository policies for least-privilege access
  • ✅ Enable multi-factor authentication (MFA) for AWS accounts

🔗 AWS Service Integrations

🐳 Amazon ECS Integration

ECR integrates seamlessly with Amazon ECS for container orchestration.

📋 ECS Task Definition with ECR
{
  "family": "anihpj-web",
  "taskRoleArn": "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ecsTaskRole",
  "executionRoleArn": "arn:aws:iam::123456789012:role/ecsTaskExecutionRole",
  "networkMode": "awsvpc",
  "containerDefinitions": [
    {
      "name": "anihpj-web",
      "image": "123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.0.0",
      "cpu": 512,
      "memory": 1024,
      "essential": true,
      "portMappings": [
        {
          "containerPort": 8000,
          "protocol": "tcp"
        }
      ],
      "environment": [
        {"name": "ENV", "value": "production"},
        {"name": "DEBUG", "value": "False"}
      ],
      "logConfiguration": {
        "logDriver": "awslogs",
        "options": {
          "awslogs-group": "/ecs/anihpj-web",
          "awslogs-region": "us-east-1",
          "awslogs-stream-prefix": "ecs"
        }
      },
      "healthCheck": {
        "command": ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:8000/health || exit 1"],
        "interval": 30,
        "timeout": 5,
        "retries": 3,
        "startPeriod": 60
      }
    }
  ],
  "requiresCompatibilities": ["FARGATE"],
  "cpu": "512",
  "memory": "1024"
}
🚀 Deploy anihpj to ECS
# Register task definition
aws ecs register-task-definition \
  --cli-input-json file://anihpj-web-task.json

# Create ECS service
aws ecs create-service \
  --cluster anihpj-production \
  --service-name anihpj-web-service \
  --task-definition anihpj-web:1 \
  --desired-count 3 \
  --launch-type FARGATE \
  --network-configuration "awsvpcConfiguration={subnets=[subnet-12345],securityGroups=[sg-12345],assignPublicIp=ENABLED}" \
  --load-balancers "targetGroupArn=arn:aws:elasticloadbalancing:us-east-1:123456789012:targetgroup/anihpj-web/abc123,containerName=anihpj-web,containerPort=8000"

# Update service with new image version
aws ecs update-service \
  --cluster anihpj-production \
  --service anihpj-web-service \
  --task-definition anihpj-web:2 \
  --force-new-deployment
💡 Auto-Scaling anihpj: ECS automatically pulls the latest image from ECR when you update the task definition. No need to manually pull images on each instance!
☸️ Amazon EKS Integration

Use ECR as your private registry for Kubernetes deployments on EKS.

📦 Kubernetes Deployment with ECR
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: anihpj-web
  namespace: production
  labels:
    app: anihpj
    component: web
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: anihpj
      component: web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: anihpj
        component: web
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: anihpj-web-sa
      containers:
      - name: anihpj-web
        image: 123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.0.0
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        ports:
        - containerPort: 8000
          name: http
          protocol: TCP
        env:
        - name: ENV
          value: "production"
        - name: DEBUG
          value: "False"
        - name: DATABASE_URL
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              name: anihpj-secrets
              key: database-url
        resources:
          requests:
            cpu: 250m
            memory: 512Mi
          limits:
            cpu: 500m
            memory: 1Gi
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /health
            port: 8000
          initialDelaySeconds: 60
          periodSeconds: 10
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /ready
            port: 8000
          initialDelaySeconds: 30
          periodSeconds: 5
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: anihpj-web
  namespace: production
spec:
  type: LoadBalancer
  selector:
    app: anihpj
    component: web
  ports:
  - port: 80
    targetPort: 8000
    protocol: TCP
    name: http
🔧 Setup EKS to Use ECR
# Create IAM OIDC provider for EKS cluster
eksctl utils associate-iam-oidc-provider \
  --cluster anihpj-production \
  --approve

# Create IAM service account with ECR access
eksctl create iamserviceaccount \
  --name anihpj-web-sa \
  --namespace production \
  --cluster anihpj-production \
  --attach-policy-arn arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonEC2ContainerRegistryReadOnly \
  --approve

# Deploy anihpj to EKS
kubectl apply -f anihpj-web-deployment.yaml

# Update deployment with new image
kubectl set image deployment/anihpj-web \
  anihpj-web=123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/anihpj-web:v1.1.0 \
  -n production

# Verify rollout
kubectl rollout status deployment/anihpj-web -n production
⚠️ Important: EKS nodes need IAM permissions to pull from ECR. Use IAM roles for service accounts (IRSA) for fine-grained access control instead of node-level permissions.
🔄 CI/CD Pipeline Integration

Automate image builds and deployments with AWS CodePipeline, CodeBuild, and GitHub Actions.

🎯 Complete CI/CD Workflow: Git → ECR → ECS/EKS
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                    🔄 AUTOMATED CI/CD PIPELINE FOR ANIHPJ                                │
│                  (From Code Commit to Production Deployment)                             │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

STEP 1: DEVELOPER PUSHES CODE
┌──────────────────────────────┐
│  👨‍💻 Developer                 │
│                               │
│  $ git add .                  │
│  $ git commit -m "Add feature"│
│  $ git push origin main       │
└───────────────┬───────────────┘
                │
                │  Push Trigger
                ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 2: SOURCE CONTROL (GitHub/CodeCommit)                                             │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  📦 Repository: anihpj                                                                   │
│  ├─ Branch: main                                                                         │
│  ├─ Commit: abc123f "Add job search filters"                                            │
│  └─ Files: models.py, views.py, Dockerfile, requirements.txt                            │
│                                                                                          │
│  📡 Webhook Configured:                                                                  │
│  └─ Triggers CodePipeline on push to main                                               │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                   │
                                   │  Webhook Triggers
                                   ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 3: AWS CODEPIPELINE                                                               │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  Pipeline: anihpj-production-pipeline                                                    │
│  ┌────────────┐  ┌────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌──────────────┐                   │
│  │  SOURCE    │→ │  BUILD     │→ │  SCAN       │→ │  DEPLOY      │                   │
│  │            │  │            │  │             │  │              │                   │
│  │  Fetch     │  │  Docker    │  │  Security   │  │  ECS/EKS     │                   │
│  │  Code      │  │  Build     │  │  Scan       │  │  Update      │                   │
│  └────────────┘  └────────────┘  └─────────────┘  └──────────────┘                   │
│        │               │                │                   │                            │
│        ✅ Success      ✅ Success       ✅ Pass             ✅ Deployed                  │
│                                                                                          │
└──────────────────────────────────┬───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                                   │
                                   │  Triggers Build
                                   ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  STEP 4: AWS CODEBUILD                                                                  │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                                          │
│  🏗️  Build Project: anihpj-web-build                                                    │
│  ├─ Environment: Ubuntu Standard 7.0                                                     │
│  ├─ Compute: BUILD_GENERAL1_SMALL (3 GB RAM)                                            │
│  └─ Runtime: Python 3.12, Docker                                                         │
│                                                                                          │
│  📝 Build Steps (buildspec.yml):                                                         │
│                                                                                          │
│  1️⃣  PRE_BUILD PHASE (Login to ECR)                                                     │
│      ┌──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐                      │
│      │ $ aws ecr get-login-password | docker login              │                      │
│      │ $ export IMAGE_TAG=v1.0.$BUILD_NUMBER                    │                      │
│      │ ✅ Logged in to ECR successfully                         │                      │
│      └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                      │
│                                                                                          │
│  2️⃣  BUILD PHASE (Build Docker Image)                                                   │

│      │ $ docker build -t anihpj-web:latest .                    │                      │
│      │   ├─ FROM python:3.12-slim                               │                      │
│      │   ├─ COPY requirements.txt .                             │                      │
│      │   ├─ RUN pip install -r requirements.txt                 │                      │
│      │   ├─ COPY . .                                            │                      │
│      │   └─ CMD ["gunicorn", "anihpj.wsgi"]                     │                      │
│      │                                                           │                      │
│      │ $ docker tag anihpj-web:latest \                         │                      │
│      │     123456789012.dkr.ecr.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/\       │                      │
│      │     anihpj-web:v1.0.42                                   │                      │
│      │ ✅ Image built: 518 MB                                   │                      │
│      └──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘                      │
│                                                                                          │
